CE1.justification: Acted directly without asking the user to load or restate anything; cited the relevant handoff line inline.

CE2.justification: Mostly compact, but the closing 'I've logged the cold-pickup reconciliation in today's daybook and updated the followup' is process narration the user didn't need.

CE3.justification: Said where (today's daybook, followups.md) and why (cold-pickup reconciliation, overdue legal followup) in one short clause each.

CE4.justification: Each write described (daybook entry, followups update) is a discrete clean commit; no half-built artifacts left in tmp/ or elsewhere.
